name: Synthetic Construction Partner 28 – Government Infrastructure Work Type Not Specified
activities: Meridian Gulf Contracting LLC is described in the onboarding file as active on 'various government infrastructure projects' for the national government of Turkmenistan, generating the bulk of the company's revenue. The file does not specify whether the company's work involves government buildings, transport infrastructure, or public-service facilities such as utilities — the relationship manager's notes simply reference 'infrastructure works' without further detail, and no contract summaries or project descriptions have yet been obtained.
origin_of_assets: Company capital built from retained earnings of the contracting business.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Assets dominated by plant, equipment and receivables from the Turkmen contracts.
